Description: In The Big Bank job, hack the correct computer on the first try. Unlocks "The First American" mask, the "Parchment" material, the "Roman" pattern and the "Tactical Grip" for the Falcon rifle.
Requirements: Hack the correct computer on the first try in The Big Bank job. Unlocks “The First American” mask, the "Parchment" material, the "Roman" pattern and the Tactical Grip for the Falcon rifle.

Name: Matrix With Lasers
Description: In the Big Bank job, open the vault by using the "Beast" drill and escape using the C4 Tunneling asset without killing any snipers on the Death Wish difficulty or above.

Name: Sweet Sixteen
Description: Complete The Big Bank job with 16 secured bags. Unlocks "The 16th" mask, the "Clay" material, the "Spartan" pattern and the "Marksman Foregrip" for the Falcon rifle.
Requirements: Complete The Big Bank job with 16 secured bags. Unlocks “The 16th” mask, the "Clay" material, the "Spartan" pattern and the Marksman Foregrip for the Falcon rifle.

Name: 12 Angry Minutes
Description: In the Big Bank job, complete the heist in under 12 minutes on the Hard difficulty or above. Unlocks the "Wooden Foregrip" for the Falcon rifle.
Requirements: In the Big Bank job, complete the heist in under 12 minutes on the Hard difficulty or above. Unlocks the Wooden Foregrip for the Falcon rifle.

Name: You Owe Me One
Description: In the Big Bank job, start the Big Bank job after having spent all 10 favors in Preplanning. Unlocks the "Retro Foregrip" for the Falcon rifle.
Requirements: In the Big Bank job, start the Big Bank job after having spent all 10 favors in Preplanning. Unlocks the Retro Foregrip for the Falcon rifle.

Name: Police Brutality
Description: Beat a Shield to death using the Telescopic Baton.

Name: Lock, Stock & Eight Smoking Barrels
Description: Own the Locomotive, Street Sweeper, Reinfeld, Mosconi, Izhma, Raven and M1014 Shotguns. Unlocks the "Flip-up Sight" for the Raven shotgun.
Requirements: Own the Locomotive, Street Sweeper, Reinfeld, Mosconi, Izhma, Raven and M1014 Shotguns. Unlocks the Flip-up Sight for the Raven shotgun.

Name: Knock, Knock
Description: Kill 50 Shields using any shotgun and slug ammo. Unlocks the "Collapsed Stock" for the M1014 shotgun.
Requirements: Kill 50 Shields using any shotgun and slug ammo. Unlocks the Collapsed Stock for the M1014 shotgun.

Name: Every day I'm Shovelin'
Description: On the Nightclub job, kill 25 law enforcers using your shovel. Unlocks the "Short Barrel" for the Raven shotgun.
Requirements: On the Nightclub heist, kill 25 law enforcers using your shovel. Unlocks the Short Barrel for the Raven shotgun.

Name: Clay Pigeon Shooting
Description: Kill 10 snipers using any shotgun and flechette ammo. Unlocks the "Long Barrel" for the Raven shotgun, "Clint" mask, "Leaf" material and "Monkey Skull" pattern.
Requirements: Kill 10 snipers using any shotgun and flechette ammo. Unlocks the Long Barrel for the Raven shotgun, "Clint" mask, "Leaf" material and "Monkey Skull" pattern.

Name: Shock and Awe
Description: Hit 4 enemies simultaneously using any shotgun and HE rounds. Unlocks the "Solid Stock" for the M1014 shotgun.
Requirements: Hit 4 enemies simultaneously using any shotgun and HE rounds. Unlocks the Tactical Stock for the M1014 shotgun.

Name: Four Monkeys
Description: In the Rats job, complete the heist while you and your four man crew are wearing one different "Shotgun Pack" mask each on the OVERKILL difficulty or above.
Requirements: In the Rats job, complete the heist while you and your four man crew are wearing one different "Shotgun Pack" mask each on OVERKILL difficulty or above.

Name: Seven Eleven
Description: Get 7 enemy headshot kills within 11 seconds using any shotgun. Unlocks the "Short Barrel" for the M1014 shotgun, "John" mask, "Explosive" material and "Terror" pattern.
Requirements: Get 7 enemy headshot kills within 11 seconds using any shotgun. Unlocks the Short Barrel for the M1014 shotgun, “John” mask, “Explosive” material and “Terror” pattern.

Name: Bang for the Buck
Description: Kill 10 Bulldozers using any shotgun and 000 buckshot ammo. Unlocks the "Long Barrel" for the Street Sweeper shotgun, "Steven" mask, "Sparks" material and "Chief" pattern.
Requirements: Kill 10 Bulldozers using any shotgun and 000 buckshot ammo. Unlocks the Long Barrel for the Street Sweeper shotgun, "Steven" mask, "Sparks" material and "Chief" pattern.

Name: Shotguns 101
Description: Complete any heist by killing at least 50 enemies and getting 101% accuracy or above using any shotgun. Unlocks the "Long Barrel" for the M1014 shotgun.
Requirements: Complete any heist by killing at least 50 enemies and get 101% accuracy or above using any shotgun. Unlocks the Long Barrel for the M1014 shotgun.

Name: No Heist for Old Men
Description: Complete any day of a heist in stealth with a Locomotive 12G shotgun modified with the "Silent Killer Suppressor" equipped. Unlocks the "Suppressed Barrel" for the Street Sweeper shotgun, "Rutger" mask, "Banana Peel" material and "Banana" pattern.
Requirements: Complete any heist in stealth with a Locomotive 12G shotgun modified with the "Silent Killer Suppressor" equipped. Unlocks the Suppressed Barrel for the Street Sweeper shotgun, "Rutger" mask, "Banana Peel" material and "Banana" pattern.

Name: Swing Dancing
Description: Complete any single day of a heist, killing at least 50 enemies using only your melee weapon.

Name: Precision Aiming
Description: Kill 25 Bulldozers using the Gewehr 3 Rifle. Unlocks the "Sniper Barrel" for the Clarion rifle, "Sniper Stock", "Sniper Grip" and "Sniper Foregrip" for the Gecko 7.62 rifle, "Precision Stock", "Precision Foregrip", "Precision Grip" and the "DMR Kit" for the Gewehr 3 rifle as well as the "Black Death" mask.
Requirements: Kill 25 Bulldozers using the Gewehr 3 Rifle. Unlocks the Sniper Barrel for the Clarion rifle, Sniper Stock, Sniper Grip and Sniper Foregrip for the Gecko 7.62 rifle, Precision Stock, Precision Foregrip, Precision Grip and the DMR Kit for the Gewehr 3 rifle as well as the “Black Death” mask.

Name: Big Bada Boom
Description: Kill at least four enemies with one GL40 grenade launcher shot. Unlocks the "Sawed-off" Stock for the GL40 grenade launcher and the "Crow Goblin" mask.
Requirements: Kill at least four enemies with one GL40 grenade launcher shot. Unlocks the Sawed-off Stock for the GL40 grenade launcher and the “Crow Goblin” mask.

Name: Army of One
Description: Equip the GL40 grenade launcher, the Locomotive 12G shotgun, and the Improved Combined Tactical Vest. Unlocks the "CQB Foregrip" and "Plastic Stock" for the Gecko 7.62 rifle.
Requirements: Equip the GL40 grenade launcher, the Locomotive shotgun and the Improved Combined Tactical Vest. Unlocks the CQB Foregrip and Plastic Stock for the Gecko 7.62 rifle.

Name: So Many Choices
Description: Own one of every Gage Assault Pack weapon in the game. Unlocks the "Short Barrel" for the Clarion rifle, "Light Stock" for the Gecko 7.62 rifle, "Plastic Foregrip" and "Assault Kit" for the Gewehr 3 rifle, "Evil" material and "Vicious" pattern.
Requirements: Own one of every Gage Assault Pack weapon in the game. Unlocks the Short Barrel for the Clarion rifle, Light Stock for the Gecko 7.62 rifle, Plastic Foregrip and Assault Kit for the Gewehr 3 rifle, “Evil” material and “Vicious” pattern.

Name: Artillery Barrage
Description: Kill 25 enemies at 40 meters or more using only the GL40 grenade launcher. Unlocks the "Wooden Stock" for the Gecko 7.62 rifle, "Pirate Barrel" for the GL40 grenade launcher, "Bone" material and "Muerte" pattern.
Requirements: Kill 25 enemies at 40 meters or more using only the GL40 grenade launcher. Unlocks the Wooden Stock for the Gecko 7.62 rifle, Pirate Barrel for the GL40 grenade launcher, “Bone” material and “Muerte” pattern.

Name: Unusual Suspects
Description: In the Watchdogs job, complete the heist while you and your four man crew are wearing one different Assault Pack mask each on the OVERKILL difficulty or above. Unlocks the "Light Foregrip" for the Gecko 7.62 rifle, "Tactical Foregrip" for the Gewehr 3 rifle, "Long Barrel" for the Clarion rifle, "Void" material and "Death" pattern.
Requirements: In the Watchdogs job, complete the heist while you and your four man crew are wearing one different Assault Pack mask each on OVERKILL difficulty or above. Unlocks the Light Foregrip for the Gecko 7.62 rifle, Tactical Foregrip for the Gewehr 3 rifle, Long Barrel for the Clarion rifle, “Void” material and “Death” pattern.

Name: Not Today
Description: Kill a jumping Cloaker using the GL40 grenade launcher. Unlocks the "Wooden Stock", "Retro Grip" and "Wooden Foregrip" for the Gewehr 3 rifle.
Requirements: Kill a jumping Cloaker using the GL40 grenade launcher. Unlocks the Wooden Stock, Retro Grip and Wooden Foregrip for the Gewehr 3 rifle.

Name: Hammertime
Description: Kill 25 thugs using the Ding Dong breaching tool melee weapon. Unlocks the "Frost" material and "Emperor" pattern.
Requirements: Kill 25 thugs using the Ding Dong breaching tool melee weapon. Unlocks the “Frost” material and “Emperor” pattern.

Name: Rabbit Hunting
Description: Kill 10 Cloakers using the Gecko 7.62 rifle. Unlocks the "Skeletal Stock", "Fabulous Stock" and "Fabulous Foregrip" for the Gecko 7.62 rifle as well as the "Volt" mask.
Requirements: Kill 10 Cloakers using the Gecko 7.62 rifle. Unlocks the Skeletal Stock, Fabulous Stock and Fabulous Foregrip for the Gecko 7.62 rifle as well as the “Volt” mask.

Name: Tour de Clarion
Description: Kill 200 enemies using the Clarion rifle. Unlocks the "Suppressed Barrel" and "G2 Grip" for the Clarion rifle as well as the "Professor Wrath" mask.
Requirements: Kill 200 enemies using the Clarion rifle. Unlocks the Suppressed Barrel and G2 Grip for the Clarion rifle as well as the “Professor Wrath” mask.

Name: Do You Like Hurting Other People?
Description: In the Hotline Miami job, kill 30 thugs with the Baseball Bat. Unlocks the "Dennis" mask, "Solid Stock" for the Uzi submachine gun, "Wooden Grip" for the Cobra submachine gun, "Rubber" material and "Hip to Be Polygon" pattern.
Requirements: In the Hotline Miami job, kill 30 thugs with the Baseball Bat. Unlocks the Dennis mask, Solid Stock for the Uzi submachine gun, Wooden Grip for the Cobra submachine gun, "Rubber" material and "Hip to Be Polygon" pattern.

Name: Sounds of Animals Fighting
Description: In the Hotline Miami job, complete the heist while you and your four man crew are wearing one different Hotline Miami mask each on the Hard difficulty or above. Unlocks the "Silent Death" and "Folded Stock" for the Uzi submachine gun, "Suppressor" and "No Stock" for the Cobra submachine gun and "Short Barrel" for the Blaster 9mm submachine gun.
Requirements: In the Hotline Miami job, complete the heist while you and your four man crew are wearing one different Hotline Miami mask each on hard or above. Unlocks the Silent Death and Folded Stock for the Uzi submachine gun, Suppressor and No Stock for the Cobra submachine gun and Short Barrel for the Blaster 9mm submachine gun.

Name: Wrong Number
Description: Complete the Hotline Miami job on the Death Wish difficulty or above.

Name: Overdose
Description: Cook and secure six bags of meth on day 1 of the Hotline Miami job. Unlocks the "Graham" mask, "Ghetto Blaster", "Extended Mag" and "Just Bend It" for the Blaster 9mm submachine gun, "Error" material and "Be Somebody" pattern.
Requirements: Cook and secure six bags of meth on day one of the Hotline Miami job. Unlocks the Graham mask, Ghetto Blaster, Extended Mag and Just Bend It for the Blaster 9mm submachine gun, "Error" material and "Be Somebody" pattern.

Name: Phew!
Description: On day 2 of the Hotline Miami job, save someone in need. Unlocks the "Aubrey" mask, "Ergo Grip", "Extended Mag" and "Unfolded Stock" for the Cobra submachine gun, "Sunset" material and "Doodles" pattern.
Requirements: On day two of the Hotline Miami job, save someone in need. Unlocks the Aubrey mask, Ergo Grip, Extended Mag and Unfolded Stock for the Cobra submachine gun, "Sunset" material and "Doodles" pattern.

Name: Walk Faster
Description: In day 2 of the Hotline Miami job, reach the Commissar's apartment in under 210 seconds on the OVERKILL difficulty or above. Unlocks the "Rasmus" mask, "Tactical Foregrip" and the "Ergonomic Stock" for the Uzi submachine gun, "Chromescape" material and "Palmtrees" pattern.
Requirements: In day two of the Hotline Miami job, reach the Commissar’s apartment in under 210 seconds on the OVERKILL difficulty or above. Unlocks the Rasmus mask, Tactical Foregrip and the Ergonomic Stock for the Uzi submachine gun, “Chromescape” material and "Palmtrees" pattern.

Name: State of the Art
Description: Complete the Art Gallery job on the Death Wish difficulty or above.
Requirements: Complete the Art Gallery heist on the Death Wish difficulty or above.

Name: Why Don't We Just Use a Spoon?
Description: Complete the Hoxton Breakout job on the Normal difficulty or above. Unlocks "Hoxton" as a playable character and the "Nova's Shank" melee weapon.
Requirements: Complete the Hoxton Breakout heist on the Normal difficulty or above. Unlocks "Hoxton" as a playable character and the "Nova's Shank" melee weapon.

Name: No Bars Can Hold Me
Description: Complete the Hoxton Breakout job on the Death Wish difficulty or above.
Requirements: Complete the Hoxton Breakout heist on the Death Wish difficulty or above.

Name: Cavity
Description: Hurt an enemy using the Nova's Shank melee weapon.

Name: Sixth Nightmare
Description: Complete the Safe House Nightmare job on the Death Wish difficulty or above.
Requirements: This is a secret achievement. It is only obtainable during the Annual Halloween Event! Complete the Safe House Nightmare on the Death Wish difficulty or above.

Name: Death From Below
Description: Kill 25 enemies as they rappel using the Nagant sniper rifle. Unlocks the "Constable" mask, the "Silenced Barrel" and the "Long Barrel" for the Nagant sniper rifle, "Gunsmoke" material and "Dazzle" pattern.
Requirements: Kill 25 enemies as they rappel using the Nagant sniper rifle. Unlocks the Constable mask, the Silenced Barrel and the Long Barrel for the Nagant sniper rifle, “Gunsmoke” material and “Dazzle” pattern.

Name: Special Operations Execution
Description: Kill 25 enemies while in stealth using the Trench knife. Unlocks the "Red Bear" mask, "Short Barrel", "Suppressed Barrel", "Short Mag", "Folded Stock", "No Stock", "Solid Stock", "Heatsinked Suppressed Barrel" for the Patchett L2A1 submachine gun," Barrel Sight 44", "Damper.L 44 Nozzle" for the Broomstick pistol, "Red Sun" material and "Death Dealer" pattern.
Requirements: Kill 25 enemies while in stealth using the Trench knife. Unlocks the Red Bear mask, Short Barrel, Suppressed Barrel, Short Mag, Folded Stock, No Stock, Solid Stock, Heatsinked Suppressed Barrel for the Patchett L2A1 submachine gun, Barrel Sight 44, Damper.L 44 Nozzle for the Broomstick pistol, “Red Sun” material and “Death Dealer” pattern.

Name: Wind of Change
Description: In the Hoxton Breakout job, complete the heist while you and your four man crew are wearing one different "Historical" mask each on the OVERKILL difficulty or above. Unlocks the "Discreet Stock" and "Short Barrel" for the Nagant sniper rifle, "Precision Barrel" for the Broomstick pistol, "Extended Mag" and "Long Barrel" for the Patchett L2A1 submachine gun and the "Heatsinked Suppressed Barrel" for the Buzzsaw 42 light machine gun.
Requirements: In the Hoxton Breakout job, complete the heist while you and your four man crew are wearing one different "Historical" mask each on OVERKILL difficulty or above. Unlocks the Discreet Stock and Short Barrel for the Nagant sniper rifle, Precision Barrel for the Broomstick pistol, Extended Mag and Long Barrel for the Patchett L2A1 submachine gun and the Heatsinked Suppressed Barrel for the Buzzsaw 42 light machine gun.

Name: So Uncivilized
Description: Equip a Broomstick pistol with the Damper.L 44 Nozzle and the Barrel Sight 44. Unlocks the "British Bulldog" mask, "High Capacity Mag" and "Holster Stock" for the Broomstick pistol, "Army Green" material and "Filthy Thirteen" pattern.
Requirements: Equip a Broomstick pistol with the Damper.L 44 Nozzle and the Barrel Sight 44. Unlocks the British Bulldog mask, High Capacity Mag and Holster Stock for the Broomstick pistol, "Army Green" material and "Filthy Thirteen" pattern.

Name: Bullet Hell
Description: Kill 10 enemies within 10 seconds using the Buzzsaw 42 light machine gun. Unlocks the "Old Blood and Guts" mask, "Light Barrel" for the Buzzsaw 42 light machine gun, "Patriot" material and "Captain War" pattern.
Requirements: Kill 10 enemies within 10 seconds using the Buzzsaw 42 light machine gun. Unlocks the Old Blood and Guts mask, Light Barrel for the Buzzsaw 42 light machine gun, "Patriot" material and "Captain War" pattern.

Name: Vlad's Little Helpers
Description: Complete the White Xmas job on the Normal difficulty or above. Unlocks the "Mrs. Claus" mask.
Requirements: Complete the White Xmas job on the Normal difficulty or above. Unlocks the “Mrs. Claus” mask.

Name: Stealing Christmas
Description: Complete the White Xmas job on the Hard difficulty or above. Unlocks the "Strinch" mask.
Requirements: Complete the White Xmas job on the Hard difficulty or above. Unlocks the “Strinch” mask.

Name: Cancelling Santa's Christmas
Description: Complete the White Xmas job on the Very Hard difficulty or above. Unlocks the "Krampus" mask.
Requirements: Complete the White Xmas job on the Very Hard difficulty or above. Unlocks the “Krampus” mask.

Name: Claustrophobia
Description: Complete the White Xmas job on the OVERKILL difficulty or above. Unlocks the "Mechanical Santa" mask.
Requirements: Complete the White Xmas job on the OVERKILL difficulty or above. Unlocks the “Mechanical Santa” mask.

Name: Like Turkeys Voting for an Early Christmas
Description: Complete the White Xmas job on the Death Wish difficulty or above.

Name: Riders On the Snowstorm
Description: In the White Xmas job, complete the heist on the Death Wish difficulty or above while each crew member wears a different "2014 Xmas" mask each. Unlocks the "Almir's Beard" mask.
Requirements: In the White Xmas job, complete the heist on the Death Wish difficulty or above while each crew member wear a different “2014 Xmas” mask each. Unlocks the “Almir’s Beard” mask.

Name: Impossible, It Can't Be. Is It?
Description: In the White Xmas job, secure the rare Almir's Toast.
Requirements: In the White Xmas job, secure the rare Almir’s Toast.

Name: Honor Among Thieves
Description: In The Diamond job, complete the heist while you and your four man crew are wearing one different "Diamond Heist" mask each on the OVERKILL difficulty or above.
Requirements: In the Diamond job, complete the heist while you and your four man crew are wearing one different "Diamond heist" mask each on OVERKILL difficulty or above.

Name: Devil of a Job
Description: Complete The Diamond job on the Death Wish difficulty or above.

Name: Cat Burglar
Description: In The Diamond job, complete the heist without triggering the alarm. Unlocks "The Cursed One" mask, "Sand" material and "Hieroglyphs" pattern.

Name: Culture Vultures
Description: In The Diamond job, secure 10 bags of additional loot. Unlocks the "Medusa" mask, "Rusting Metal" material and "Runes" pattern.

Name: Smoke and Mirrors
Description: In The Diamond job, steal the Diamond and escape in under 10 minutes. Unlocks the "Pazuzu" mask, "Diamond" material and "Horus" pattern.

Name: Diamonds in the Rough
Description: In The Diamond job, complete the heist, diamond puzzle and steal the Diamond after the alarm has been triggered on the OVERKILL difficulty or above. Unlocks the "Anubis" mask, "Mummy Bandages" material and "Hawk Helm" pattern.
Requirements: In the Diamond job, complete the heist, diamond puzzle and steal the Diamond after the alarm has been triggered on OVERKILL difficulty or above. Unlocks the "Anubis" mask, "Mummy Bandages" material and "Hawk Helm" pattern.

Name: Tabula Rasa
Description: In the Hoxton Breakout job, complete the heist on the OVERKILL difficulty or above with each crew member using no skills, wearing suits, wielding Golden AK.762 rifles and Chicago Typewriter submachine guns. Unlocks a new skill slot.
Requirements: In the Hoxton Breakout job, complete the heist on OVERKILL difficulty or above with each crew member using no skills, wearing suits, wielding Golden AK.762 rifles and Chicago Typewriter submachine guns. Unlocks a new skill slot.

Name: Knockout!
Description: Knock out a Bulldozer using the OVERKILL boxing gloves. Unlocks "The Champ" mask.

Name: Derailed
Description: Complete The Bomb: Forest job on the Normal difficulty or above.
Requirements: Complete the Bomb: Forest heist on any difficulty.

Name: A Pine in the Ass
Description: Complete The Bomb: Forest job on the Death Wish difficulty or above.
Requirements: Complete the Bomb: Forest heist on the Death Wish difficulty or above.

Name: Beaver Team
Description: In The Bomb: Forest job, cut down all trees within 5 seconds. Unlocks the "Butcher From Hell" mask, "Meat" material and "Pleter" pattern.
Requirements: In the Bomb: Forest heist, cut down all trees within 5 seconds during the plane escape. Unlocks the "Butcher From Hell" mask, "Meat" material and "Pleter" pattern.

Name: Pump It Up
Description: In The Bomb: Forest job, do not let the cops disconnect the water hose while you are using the river water pump. Unlocks the "Tech Lion" mask, "Marble Rock" material and "Lion Game Lion" pattern.
Requirements: In the Bomb: Forest heist, do not let the cops disconnect the water hose while you are using the river water pump. Unlocks the "Tech Lion" mask, "Marble Rock" material and "Lion Game Lion" pattern.

Name: Oppressor
Description: Complete The Bomb: Forest job without letting any civilian flee or die, having at least five civilians in the heist, while escaping with the boat. Unlocks "The Doctor" mask, "Plywood" material and "Caduceus" pattern.
Requirements: Finish the Bomb: Forest heist without letting any civilian flee or die, having at least five civilians in the heist, while escaping with the boat. Unlocks "The Doctor" mask, "Plywood" material and "Caduceus" pattern.

Name: Maiden Voyage
Description: Complete The Bomb: Dockyard job on the Normal difficulty or above.
Requirements: Complete the Bomb: Dockyard heist on any difficulty.

Name: Fisherman's Fiend
Description: Complete The Bomb: Dockyard job on the Death Wish difficulty or above.
Requirements: Complete the Bomb: Dockyard heist on the Death Wish difficulty or above.

Name: Sneaking With the Fishes
Description: Complete The Bomb: Dockyard job in stealth on the Death Wish difficulty or above. Unlocks the "Lady Butcher" mask, "Rhino" material and "Checker Board" pattern.
Requirements: Complete the Bomb: Dockyard heist in stealth on the Death Wish difficulty. Unlocks the "Lady Butcher" mask, "Rhino" material and "Checker Board" pattern.

Name: Breaking Dead
Description: In The Bomb: Dockyard job, find the meth lab. Unlocks the "Extended Mag" for the LEO pistol.
Requirements: In the Bomb: Dockyard heist, find the meth lab. Unlocks the "Extended Mag" for the LEO pistol.

Name: I've Got the Power
Description: In The Bomb: Dockyard job, don't let the enemies cut the power. Unlocks the "Long Slide" for the LEO pistol.
Requirements: In the Bomb: Dockyard heist, don't let the enemies cut the power. Unlocks the "Long Slide" for the LEO pistol.

Name: Done in 60 Seconds
Description: In The Bomb: Dockyard job, open the dock gate in 60 seconds using the keycards. Unlocks the "Custom Slide" for the LEO pistol.
Requirements: In the Bomb: Dockyard heist, open the dock gate in 60 seconds using the keycards. Unlocks the "Custom Slide" for the LEO pistol.

Name: OVE SAW 72000
Description: In the Nightclub job, complete the heist on any difficulty with each crew member using the OVE 9000 saw as primary and secondary weapons. Unlocks the "THRUST Upper Receiver", "THRUST Lower Receiver" and "Long Ergo Foregrip" for the CAR weapon family.

Name: Hey Mr. DJ
Description: In the Nightclub job, have 12 hostages or more on the dance floor when you escape. Unlocks the "Aluminum Grip" for the AK weapon family, the "Aluminum Foregrip" for the Krinkov submachine gun and the "LW Upper Receiver" for the CAR weapon family.

Name: $1.8M Speedrun
Description: In the Mallcrasher job, loot $1,800,000 in loose cash within 50 seconds of starting the heist. The heist must be played on the OVERKILL difficulty. Unlocks the "Scope Mount" and "PBS Suppressor" for the AK weapon family, "Alfred" mask, "Dawn" material and "Dinosaur Skull" pattern.
Requirements: In the Mallcrasher job, loot $1,800,000 in loose cash within 50 seconds of starting the heist on the OVERKILL difficulty. Unlocks the "Scope Mount" and "PBS Suppressor" for the AK weapon family, "Alfred" mask, "Dawn" material and "Dinosaur Skull" pattern.

Name: Here Comes the Pain Train
Description: In the Firestarter job, complete the heist on the OVERKILL difficulty or above, with all days done in loud and with a crew of 4 players using unmodified "AK Rifle" rifles and "PARA" submachine guns. Unlocks the "DMR Kit AK.762" and the "Low Drag Magazine" for the AK weapon family, "Timothy" mask, "Prehistoric" material and "Dinosaur Stripes" pattern.
Requirements: In the Firestarter job, complete the heist on OVERKILL difficulty or above, with all days done in loud and with a crew of 4 players using unmodified "AK Rifle" rifles and "PARA" submachine guns. Unlocks the "DMR Kit AK.762" and the "Low Drag Magazine" for the AK weapon family, "Timothy" mask, "Prehistorical" material and "Dinosaur Stripes" pattern.

Name: The Wolf Lures You to Your Grave
Description: In the Art Gallery job, kill two of the patrolling guards in stealth in the bathroom. Unlocks the "E.M.O. Foregrip" and the "OVAL Foregrip" for the CAR weapon family and the "Aftermarket Shorty" for the PARA submachine gun.

Name: The Turtle Always Wins
Description: In the Art Gallery job, complete the heist in stealth within 4 minutes with each crew member wearing the Improved Combined Tactical Vest and no Armor Bag deployable equipped. Unlocks the "Classic Stock" for the AK weapon family, "2 Piece Stock" for the AK and CAR weapon families, "Pachy" mask, "Fossil" material and "Prehistoric Predator" pattern.
Requirements: In the Art Gallery job, complete the heist in stealth within 4 minutes with each crew member wearing the Improved Combined Tactical Vest and no Armor Kit deployable equipped. Unlocks the "Classic Stock" for the AK weapon family, "2 Piece Stock" for the AK and CAR weapon families, "Pachy" mask, "Fossil" material and "Prehistoric Predator" pattern.

Name: Private Party
Description: In the Jewelry store job, don't let the cops enter the jewelry store until the van comes back on the OVERKILL difficulty or above. Unlocks the "DMR Kit AMR-16" and the "L5 Magazine" for the CAR weapon family, "Vincent" mask, "Feathers" material and "Dinosaur Scars" pattern.
Requirements: In the Jewelry store job, don't let the cops enter the jewelry store until the van comes back on OVERKILL difficulty or above. Unlocks the "DMR Kit AMR-16" and the "L5 Magazine" for the CAR weapon family, "Vincent" mask, "Feathers" material and "Dinosaur Scars" pattern.

Name: The Collector
Description: Kill 100 cops using only weapons from the AK or CAR weapon families. Unlocks the "Keymod Rail", the "Crabs Rail" and the "Modern Barrel" for the AK weapon family.

Name: Becoming Villainous
Description: Reach the sixth rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the sixth level of Infamy.

Name: Becoming Abominable
Description: Reach the seventh rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the seventh level of Infamy.

Name: Becoming Fiendish
Description: Reach the eighth rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the eight level of Infamy.

Name: Becoming Heinous
Description: Reach the ninth rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the ninth level of Infamy.

Name: Becoming Mean
Description: Reach the tenth rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the tenth level of Infamy.

Name: Becoming Dangerous
Description: Reach the eleventh rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the eleventh level of Infamy.

Name: Becoming Fearless
Description: Reach the twelfth rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the twelveth level of Infamy.

Name: Becoming Nefarious
Description: Reach the thirteenth rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the thirdeenth level of Infamy.

Name: Becoming Disreputable
Description: Reach the fourteenth rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the fourtheenth level of Infamy.

Name: Becoming Fearful
Description: Reach the fifteenth rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the fiftheenth level of Infamy.

Name: Becoming Opprobrious
Description: Reach the sixteenth rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the sixteenth level of Infamy.

Name: Becoming Shady
Description: Reach the seventeenth rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the seventeenth level of Infamy.

Name: Becoming Savage
Description: Reach the eighteenth rank of Infamy.
Requirements: Reach the eighteenth level of Infamy.

Name: Bleeding Cash
Requirements: Perform 99 double kills with any armor-penetrating weapon

Name: Gift for You
Requirements: Find and loot 99 pieces of loose cash.

Name: Go for Gold
Requirements: Kill 99 enemies with the money bundle melee weapon

Name: The Fire within
Requirements: Secure 9 Almir's Toasts on Overkill Difficulty or above

Name: Lucky Star
Requirements: Kill 2000 enemies with any sniper rifle

Name: Constelation Prize
Requirements: Kill 150 Cloakers with the North Star Rifle on Very Hard difficulty or above.

Name: Diamonds in the Sky
Requirements: perform 1000 double kills with the North Star Rifle on any difficulty

Name: Gift Swap
Requirements: Secure 20 loot bags (followed by a successful escape) on any difficulty

Name: No Presents for You
Requirements: Kill 40 Dozers on Overkill Difficulty or Above

Name: Frostbite
Requirements: Secure 100 loot bags (followed by a successful escape) on any difficulty

Name: Shredding Christmas
Requirements: Secure 250 loot bags (followed by a successful escape) on any difficulty

Name: The Abominable Dozer
Requirements: Kill 200 Dozers on Overkill difficulty or above

Name: Holiday Cheer
Requirements: Secure 500 loot bags (followed by a successful escape) on any difficulty

Name: Smash and Grab
Requirements: Complese 50 Heists

Name: The Musketeers
Requirements: Kill 100 enemies with a sniper rifle

Name: Bang for Your Buck
Requirements: Secure 100 bags

Name: Ham-mer time
Requirements: Melee kill 100 enemies

Name: Bay of Pigs
Requirements: Kill 100 Dozers

Name: Get Buff
Requirements: Collect 100 Gage Packages

Name: A War Well-Fought
Description: A beautifully-preserved Parabellum pistol. Aldstone's Quarters.
Requirements: Complete the "Prepare for War" side job.

Name: Bain's Guide
Description: Bain received The Guide of Cagliostro as payment for a heist against a hospital in New York many years ago Duke's Gallery.
Requirements: Complete the No Mercy job on the Normal difficulty or above.

Name: Big Daddy
Description: You wouldn't think so, but you can kill a dozer with these things. The living room.
Requirements: Knock out 5 Bulldozers with the OVERKILL Boxing Gloves.

Name: Bushido
Description: You really wanted this armor, more than anything else. Jiro's Lounge.
Requirements: In the Shadow Raid heist, steal all the Samurai Armor before grabbing or securing any other loot, playing on OVERKILL difficulty or above.

Name: But It's The Tooth!
Description: THAT'S A BIG TOOTHBRUSH! Top Floor bathroom.
Requirements: Find the toothbrush in the Panic Room heist.

Name: Clueless
Description: A nice, fat, benevolent pig full of money. The living room.
Requirements: Complete The Big Bank heist on the OVERKILL difficulty or above, with no crew member using any skills.

Name: Computer
Description: This computer is a really old, slow piece of shit. Wolf's Workshop.
Requirements: Finish day 1 of the Election Day heist after breaking stealth and completing the entire intel download on the computer.

Name: Dance Party
Description: This jar contains evidence of the destructive work of a good SMG. Chains' Weapons Workshop.
Requirements: Kill 25 enemies in 25 seconds using only SMGs.

Name: Dartboard
Description: Use it to display your unmatched throwing accuracy. Grenades don't count. Jimmy's Bar.
Requirements: Perform 500 headshot kills.

Name: Diamonds
Description: You had to swat some wheels to get this beauty. Bottom Floor bathroom.
Requirements: Finish the Diamond Store heist with all bags and destroying the SWAT Turret, on OVERKILL difficulty or above. Requires securing 18 bags, can be reached with both money and diamond bags.

Name: Disco Night
Description: A very tasteful disco ball from the Tasteful Club. Above the living room.
Requirements: Finish the Night Club heist in stealth on DEATH WISH difficulty or above.

Name: Dozer
Description: This is a nice dozer helmet. Keep 'em flying. Jacket's Hangout.
Requirements: Kill 100 special units.

Name: Escape Van
Description: This is a model of your escape van. It'll take you anywhere - or, rather, away from it. The living room.
Requirements: Successfully complete 10 escapes.

Name: Evolution
Description: Experiment. Mutate. Evolve. The living room.
Requirements: Complete any heist with an active mutator.

Name: Failed Assassination
Description: A sniper rifle. Some people really underestimate the possibilities of it. The living room.
Requirements: Complete the Undercover heist on the OVERKILL difficulty or above, with each crew member only using sniper rifles, no skills, and wearing the Two-Piece Suit.

Name: Falcogini
Description: A scale model of a Falcogini. Yes, you once stole a real one. Drive in style. The living room.
Requirements: Finish the Car Shop job on any difficulty.

Name: First Steps
Description: Even the infamous once started small. Or, in other words, we all suck at first. The living room.
Requirements: Complete all the basic heists.

Name: Friends in Close Quarters
Description: The deadly Push Daggers, your pair of true friends when in need. Aldstone's Quarters.
Requirements: Complete the "Knife Legislation" side job.

Name: Get Off My Lawn!
Description: You managed to fight the cops off. This barbed wire will make it harder for them to get in next time. Safe House perimeter walls.
Requirements: Successfully defend your safe house against a police raid on OVERKILL difficulty or above.

Name: Goat
Description: Ah that day with the goats...but whose idea was it to bring one back here? It's not even housetrained. The living room.
Requirements: Extract 25 goats on Day 2 of the Goat Simulator heist.

Name: Golden Grin
Description: It's the kind of grin you flash when you've stolen the big loot with absolutely perfect skill. Bonnie's Gambling Den.
Requirements: Complete the Golden Grin Casino heist on Death Wish difficulty or above, equipped with only silenced pistols.

Name: Gone Fishing
Description: Quiet as a catfish, you stole all the cash from that yacht. But it wasn't easy. The living room.
Requirements: Complete The Yacht Heist in stealth with all team members at maximum detection.

Name: Hero's Companion
Description: The Galant rifle is a trusted service rifle of the US armed forces. The Crown Jewel in any respectable collection. Aldstone's Quarters.
Requirements: Complete the "The Control's Hundred Tab" side job.

Name: Historiographer
Description: Aldstone's very proud of acquisition of the four masks, particularly this blood red beret. Aldstone's Quarters.
Requirements: Unlock all four of the RAID character masks.

Name: Humanitarian
Description: A first aid locker. Because we care about the medical profession. Ground Floor bathroom.
Requirements: Complete Beneath the Mountain heist on Mayhem difficulty or above, without killing any medics.

Name: I Got This
Description: This is an homage to the discreet power of the ECM jammer. Not that you needed one, that time at the Car Shop. The living room.
Requirements: Successfully complete the Car Shop heist with a detection risk of 70 or above, without using ECM Jammers.

Name: I Just Had To
Description: A little souvenir that you picked up when raiding the FBI offices. The living room.
Requirements: Successfully complete Day 2 of the Firestarter heist in stealth.

Name: It's Not Even Fresh...
Description: Someone liked this sandwich so much that they locked in a safe to protect it. It must be really good. Top Floor kitchen.
Requirements: In The Big Bank job, find the half-eaten sandwich in the safe

Name: Jason
Description: Yes, you took it. But do you really really need it? The living room.
Requirements: Find the hobo's knife in the Aftershock heist.

Name: Long Fellow
Description: A multiple warhead delivery vehicle. Outside the Garage.
Requirements: Finish the Meltdown job within 7 minutes, on OVERKILL difficulty or above.

Name: Medic
Description: A golden syringe. Because you've sent enough medics to the hospital to solve their staff shortage problems for good. The living room.
Requirements: Kill 100 medics.

Name: Meth
Description: For dummies and others who want to get into the meth cooking business. The living room.
Requirements: Finish the Cook Off heist with 25 bags of meth on OVERKILL difficulty or above.

Name: Mercenary
Description: A painting to celebrate friendship. Friends don't shoot friends in the back. The living room.
Requirements: Complete any heist with the Friendly Fire mutator active, without hurting another player, while playing on the Death Wish difficulty or above. This trophy requires four players in the heist.

Name: Mother of Mothers
Description: You are just the perfect host. The Garage doorway.
Requirements: Successfully complete 10 heists while playing as the host. Completing heists solo will still count towards this trophy.

Name: Not So Fast
Description: You don't have to be the fastest runner to win the race. Not if you're willing to shoot the other guy in the kneecaps. Jiro's Lounge.
Requirements: Find the hidden tortoise in the Heat Street heist.

Name: Old Faithful
Description: You've been through so much together. Guess it's one of those love/hate relationships. Dallas' Office.
Requirements: Successfully complete 1 bank heist on the OVERKILL difficulty or above.

Name: Pelican Killer
Description: You just don't like 'em, 's all. On the hill outside the Garage.
Requirements: Shoot 20 pelicans on the Scarface Mansion job.

Name: Robbedacop
Description: A statue of a great and infamous cop killer. The Vault.
Requirements: Kill 658893 enemies.

Name: Scrap Metal
Description: Ernesto Sosa didn't like it when you destroyed his car. Or when you killed him. Scarface's Room.
Requirements: Complete the Scarface Mansion job on the Mayhem difficulty or above in loud, with four players all using the Maniac perk deck and no skills. To complete this challenge, you have to have played the job from start to finish.

Name: Snipe It
Description: You did this. You could do it a hundred times in a row, too. John Wick's Shooting Range.
Requirements: Complete the Watchdogs heist using only sniper rifles, with an accuracy of 100% or above.

Name: So Pretty
Description: It's a real beauty. Who's gonna wear it? The living room.
Requirements: Finish the Ukrainian Job on Death Wish difficulty or above, with no crew members equipping ECM Jammers.

Name: Spooky Pumpkin
Description: The spookiest pumpkin ever. The living room.
Requirements: Destroy the pumpkin on the Prison Nightmare job.

Name: Speed Talker
Description: A well-oiled MP40 submachine gun, skillfully restored. Aldstone's Quarters.
Requirements: Complete the "Rapid Retribution" side job.

Name: Staying Alive
Description: Read and learn. Then dance, dance, dance. Just don't trip, and mind the mines. Wolf's Workshop.
Requirements: Complete the Nightclub heist only using tripmines to kill enemies. Requires you to wield C4 and NOTHING else. Jack Of All Trades will fail this trophy!

Name: The Bullet
Description: With every bullet we shoot, we should remember there is only one, true Bullet. The living room.
Requirements: Find the hidden Bullet Trophy(sic) in Bank Heist and Jewelry Store. Five trophy pickups are required.

Name: The Burn Offshore Money Button
Description: Don't push the button! Outside the Vault.
Requirements: Burn all of your offshore cash in the Safe House. 1) This is a secret trophy and will not show up on the list until cleared. 2) Earning this trophy will reset your Offshore Account balance to 0. 3) Minimum of $50,000,000 on Offshore Account is required to enable the button.

Name: The Cultist
Description: The Cultist declared himself the hero only to realize that his actions could very well have made him the villain. The living room.
Requirements: Find the hidden Cultist Trophy(sic) in Hoxton Breakout Day 1 and Diamond Store. Five trophy pickups are required.

Name: The Elephant In The Room
Description: It feels as though that painting is looking at you... The living room.
Requirements: Complete the Framing Frame heist on OVERKILL difficulty or above, without breaking stealth for the entire 3 days of the heist.

Name: The Elephant's Coffer
Description: At the Gates of Silent Memory you stand. One, two, three, one. Open them and see the darkness engulf the world, to the bain of all as a new Watchman ascends. Zi dingir kia kanpa, zi dingir anna kanpa Top Floor kitchen.
Requirements: Complete the Breakin' Feds heist on the Normal Difficulty or above

Name: The First Line
Description: Who are these people anyway? Sokol's Hockey Gym.
Requirements: On Day 3 of the Firestarter job, find the rare poster of the OVERKILL hockey team.

Name: The Healer's Coffer
Description: The Gold is bright enough to burn, dark enough to blind. It waits, Dead but Dreaming beneath the Earth, until the Time of Alignment. Three and One, Four and One. The Watcher returns Top Floor kitchen.
Requirements: Complete The Golden Grin Casino and Henry's Rock jobs on the Normal Difficulty or above

Name: The Marine
Description: In honor of the one that survived the Interdimensional Horror! The living room.
Requirements: Find the hidden Marine Trophy(sic) on Go Bank(sic) and Four Stores. Five trophy pickups are required.

Name: The Medallion Of Perseids
Description: This bronze medallion was made in the 19th century. It depicts a Fleur De Lis and Peridot crystal, with writing in ancient cuneiform along the edge. It has been buried in a lead-lined box for over 100 years. Duke's Gallery.
Requirements: Complete the Brooklyn Bank job on the Overkill difficulty or above.

Name: The Obsidian Plate
Description: Some things are best forgotten, lest the secrets they hold undo the world. Offer your flesh, your heart, to stave the darkness. Stare into the abyss long enough, and you will welcome the end, for in the cracks and hollows, the Earth is good. Top Floor kitchen.
Requirements: Complete the Shacklethorne Auction Job on the Normal Difficulty or above.

Name: The Ring
Description: Nine for mortal men. And a tenth for the mad heister that doomed them to die. The living room.
Requirements: In the Birth of Sky heist, find all 9 rings.

Name: The Robber
Description: Armored cars. They are like toys to you. The living room.
Requirements: Finish all Armored Transport heists on OVERKILL difficulty or above. Also requires Transport: Train Heist

Name: The Robot
Description: Machine, Mechano-man, Can-opener, Number 4. This Robot has had many names! The living room.
Requirements: Find the hidden Robot Trophy(sic) on Shadow Raid and First World Bank. Five trophy pickups are required.

Name: The Scribe's Coffer
Description: For Her light thou wouldst flee, but thou cannot get away and are taken to ground. From hell's heart thou art stabbed. For hate's sake, the darkness spits at thee. Thou will not find respite upon this Earth. Top Floor kitchen.
Requirements: Complete Henry's Rock on Normal Difficulty or above.

Name: The World Is Yours
Description: The world, chico, and everything in it. Scarface's Room.
Requirements: Secure 24 bags of Yayo on the Scarface Mansion job.

Name: Tickets, Please!
Description: Everyone likes trains. And you like robbing trains too. You cleared one out in the woods once, remember? The living room.
Requirements: Finish The Bomb: Forest heist on Death Wish difficulty or above. To unlock this challenge, you have to have played the job from start to finish.

Name: Tied Up
Description: The cops aren't issued cable ties so they're forced to use these strange contraptions instead. You picked these ones up on Green Bridge. The living room.
Requirements: Find at least four out of the six pairs of handcuffs in the Green Bridge heist.

Name: True Ace
Description: The only card you need. The living room.
Requirements: Kill 100 enemies with the Ace of Spades throwable, while playing on the OVERKILL difficulty or above.

Name: Turret
Description: You stole this from a train. It wasn't easy, but damn it looks good here. Wolf's Workshop.
Requirements: Finish the Armored Transport: Train heist with all bags, on OVERKILL difficulty or above.

Name: Ultimate Heister
Description: A statue to honor the ultimate heister. The Vault.
Requirements: Complete all contracts on the One Down difficulty.

Name: Vlad's Tape
Description: Oh, boy. Vlad's gonna be pissed if he finds out you didn't burn this. But, what's so special about this particular message? It's no secret he always plays several angles... Top Floor Kitchen.
Requirements: Search a little extra in the vault of the San Martín Bank.

Name: Who's There?
Description: You earned this through your spectral moves and ghostly presence. The living room.
Requirements: Successfully complete 15 different heists in stealth, on OVERKILL difficulty or above.
